instruction:
A particle is moving with uniform acceleration along a straight line AB. Its speed at A and B are 2m/s  and 14 m/s respectively then

Options:
A. The time to go from A to the mid point of AB is one-third of that to go from mid point to B
B. non of these
C. The time to go from A to the mid point of AB is triple of that to go from mid point to B
D. The time to go from A to the mid point of AB is the same as that to go from mid point to B
E. The time to go from A to the mid point of AB is half of that to go from the mid point to B
F. The time to go from A to the mid point of AB is half of that to go from mid point to B
G. The time to go from A to the mid point of AB is one-fourth of that to go from mid point to B
H. The time to go from A to the mid point of AB is double of that to go from mid point to B
